nodes.html:
Overview

HavocAI is building autonomous vessels, including 100-foot robot boats, for sea, air, and land operations. I lead the cloud infrastructure that powers these systems.

Role

As a Senior Platform Engineer, I work on the cloud platform team responsible for:

  • Building and maintaining backend services that communicate with vessels
  • Developing AI/ML infrastructure for autonomous navigation
  • Creating edge/cloud integration pipelines
  • Ensuring production reliability for systems operating at sea

Tech Stack

  • Backend: Go, Python, TypeScript
  • Cloud: AWS (IAM, VPC, EC2, EKS, S3)
  • Infrastructure: Kubernetes, Docker, OpenTofu, Pulumi, GitOps
  • AI/ML: MLflow, Auto-labeling, MLOps
  • IoT: Distributed async, edge computing

Key Projects

Vessel Communication Platform

Built real-time communication layer between shore-based operations and autonomous vessels. Handles telemetry data, command/control signals, and mission planning.

AI/ML Pipeline

Designed and implemented ML training and inference pipelines for navigation models. Integrated with edge devices on vessels for real-time decision making.

Edge-Cloud Integration

Developed robust connectivity solutions for intermittent network conditions at sea. Implemented offline-first patterns and intelligent data synchronization.

Impact

  • Leading infrastructure for next-generation autonomous maritime systems
  • Building systems that must operate reliably in harsh marine environments
  • Bridging cutting-edge AI research with production systems

Overview

Harness is a leading cloud software development platform. After ZeroNorth was acquired by Harness in 2021, I helped build the first security center product, Security Testing Orchestration (STO).

Role

Started as Software Engineer II, promoted to Senior Software Engineer I, then Senior Software Engineer II. Contributed across the full stack while specializing in platform integrations and security tooling.

Tech Stack

  • Backend: Go, Python
  • Security Tools: Integrated with 20+ security scanners (SAST, DAST, SCA, container scanning)
  • Cloud: GCP, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform
  • Frontend: React, TypeScript, Webpack, Microfrontends

Key Projects

STO Core Platform

Built the core orchestration engine that automates security scanning across the software delivery pipeline. Enabled teams to run security tests as part of CI/CD without manual intervention.

Scanner Integrations

Implemented integrations with 20+ security scanning tools including Snyk, SonarQube, Checkmarx, Black Duck, Qualys, and others. Created standardized interfaces for running scans and normalizing results.

Internal Code Management Migration

Led migration of internal code management from third-party platform to Harness's own Git-based solution. Coordinated a complex cross-team effort with minimal disruption.

Platform Extensibility

Built extensibility features allowing customers to create custom scanner integrations and workflows. Designed API surface for third-party integrations.

Achievements

  • Multiple Star Performer awards (2022, 2023, 2024)
  • Built sellable product from acquisition in under 6 months
  • Contributed to open-source projects on Harness GitHub
  • Grew from individual contributor to senior engineer with increasing scope

Overview

ZeroNorth was a Boston-based startup providing a platform for automating and orchestrating security scanning across enterprise environments.

Role

As a Software Engineer II, I worked as a full-stack developer building both the frontend interface and backend services for the security platform.

Tech Stack

  • Backend: Python, Node.js
  • Frontend: Angular, TypeScript
  • Infrastructure: Kubernetes
  • Security: Security runners, integration with 15+ scanners
  • Cloud: AWS

Key Projects

Security Orchestration Engine

Built the core engine that orchestrates security scans across multiple tools and environments. Designed workflows for scheduling, parallel execution, and result aggregation. Deployed on AWS with Kubernetes orchestration.

Scanner Integrations

Integrated with 15+ security scanning tools including SAST, DAST, and SCA tools. Created standardized interfaces for running scans and normalizing findings.

User Interface

Developed Angular-based user interface for configuring scan schedules, viewing results, and managing remediation workflows. Created intuitive dashboards for security teams.

API Development

Built RESTful APIs for scanner management, scan execution, and result retrieval. Implemented authentication and authorization patterns.

Impact

  • Helped establish core security orchestration capabilities
  • Gained deep experience in cybersecurity domain
  • Developed strong full-stack skills working across the entire stack

Overview

PCRI (Professional Conference and Research Institute) hosts an annual summit for healthcare professionals. I served as event technology consultant for two consecutive years, managing the technical aspects of their virtual and hybrid conferences.

Role

  • Managed event registration and ticketing through Eventbrite
  • Configured and managed Zoom for virtual/hybrid event delivery
  • Built integrations between Eventbrite and Zoom for seamless attendee experience
  • Created scripts to generate attendee credential lists from both platforms
  • Ensured reliable event delivery for conferences with 500+ attendees

Tech Stack

  • Event Management: Eventbrite
  • Virtual Events: Zoom
  • Integration: Eventbrite API, Zoom API
  • Automation: Python scripting

Key Projects

Event Integration

Built automated integration between Eventbrite and Zoom to sync registration data, generate unique join links, and manage attendee access.

Credential Management

Developed Python scripts to extract and merge attendee data from Eventbrite and Zoom APIs, generating credential lists for event access and check-in.

Event Execution

Managed live event technical requirements including breakout rooms, virtual networking sessions, and Q&A infrastructure.

Impact

  • Successfully executed two annual summits with 500+ attendees each
  • Streamlined registration process through API automation
  • Created repeatable processes for future PCRI events

Overview

We Roast Coffee is a local coffee company in northern Rhode Island. I worked with the founder to build the digital presence and online store.

Role

Solo developer building and maintaining the e-commerce platform and digital assets for a local coffee company.

Tech Stack

  • Frontend: Gatsby (React), JavaScript
  • E-commerce: Shopify
  • CMS: Contentful
  • Auth: Auth0
  • Hosting: Netlify

Key Projects

Shopify Store

Built online store with Shopify, hosted on a memorable domain (weroast.coffee). Integrated payment processing, inventory management, and shipping calculations.

JAMstack Blog

Initially built a proof-of-concept blog using JAMstack (JavaScript, APIs, Markdown) with Gatsby. Later replaced with the Shopify store.

Authentication

Implemented user authentication and authorization using Auth0 for customer accounts and admin access.

Custom Domain

Configured memorable domain and DNS settings for seamless customer experience.

Media Coverage

  • The Valley Breeze
  • tourblackstone.com

Impact

  • Built technical foundation for successful local business
  • Learned full-stack development and client communication
  • First experience running production workloads on cloud infrastructure

Overview

Optum is the technology subsidiary of United Health Group, the largest health insurance provider in the country, serving over 49 million members.

Role

Started as Technology Development Intern, then full-time Technology Development Associate, promoted to Software Engineer. Worked on internal enterprise applications supporting healthcare operations.

Tech Stack

  • Frontend: React, Next.js
  • Backend: Node, Java, Python
  • Database: Cassandra, MySQL, MongoDB, TigerGraph
  • Cloud: GCP
  • ML: TensorFlow, PyTorch
  • Enterprise: Mainframe integration, legacy systems

Key Projects

Web Application Development

Built and maintained multiple web applications using React, Next.js, and Node.js. Created responsive UIs and RESTful APIs for enterprise healthcare systems.

Claims Processing System

Worked on internal systems for processing insurance claims. Built APIs and web interfaces for claims intake and processing using Java and SQL.

Member Portal

Contributed to customer-facing portal for members to view claims, coverage, and benefits information using React and Node.

Data Integration

Built integration pipelines connecting various internal systems. Worked with large datasets and batch processing using Cassandra, MongoDB, and TigerGraph.

Achievements

  • Received return offer during internship (junior year)
  • Promoted from intern to full-time to associate to engineer
  • Gained foundational enterprise software experience
  • Learned healthcare industry domain knowledge
